seo.title: Retirement Calculator | Numerly
seo.description: Project retirement corpus using current savings, monthly contributions, and expected annual return.

intro: Project retirement savings growth from current age to retirement age.
explanation: The calculator compounds current savings and recurring monthly contributions at an expected annual return rate.

formula.expression: Future value combines lump-sum compounding and annuity growth of monthly contributions.

example.input: Age 30 to 65, $25,000 current savings, $750 monthly, 7% return
steps: Add future value of monthly contribution stream
example.result: Output includes projected corpus, total contributions, and growth.

faqs.a: No. Return assumptions are estimates and may vary.
Yes, use a real return assumption if desired.
No, taxes are not modeled in this basic projection.
This model assumes constant monthly contribution.
More time allows compounding to drive larger growth.

instructions: Add future value of monthly contribution stream
formulaExplanation: The calculator compounds current savings and recurring monthly contributions at an expected annual return rate.
edgeCases: Very long terms can significantly increase interest cost.
Zero or near-zero rates reduce compounding impact.
Always verify units (monthly vs annual) before interpreting output.
practicalTips: Compare at least two scenarios before making decisions.
Use conservative assumptions for rates and growth.
Review total cost, not just monthly amount.
